assertions.title: Trait declarations without Self lower to working Go interfaces

steps.action: Compile the dedicated `.rg` fixture with the `rgoc` CLI.
steps.expected: Compilation succeeds and writes a Go file to the requested output path.
steps.observed: `nix develop --quiet -c dune exec rgoc -- /home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-no-self.rg -o /home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-no-self.go` exited 0 and created `phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-no-self.go`.

steps.action: Inspect the generated Go artifact for the trait-specific lowering expected by the assertion.
steps.expected: Generated Go shows the required interface / impl lowering for the trait feature under test.
steps.observed: Generated Go contains `type Greet interface {` and `func (self Person) Hello() string {`; downstream `go run` printed `Alice`.

steps.action: Run downstream Go validation on the generated artifact.
steps.expected: `gofmt -d`, `go build`, `go vet`, and `go run` succeed; runtime output matches the fixture expectation.
steps.observed: `gofmt -d`, `go build -o /dev/null`, `go vet`, and `go run` all exited 0. Normalized runtime stdout was `Alice`.

steps.action: Compile the dedicated `.rg` fixture with the `rgoc` CLI.
steps.expected: Compilation succeeds and writes a Go file to the requested output path.

steps.observed: `gofmt -d`, `go build -o /dev/null`, `go vet`, and `go run` all exited 0. Normalized runtime stdout was `equal`.

steps.action: Compile the dedicated `.rg` fixture with the `rgoc` CLI.
steps.expected: Compilation succeeds and writes a Go file to the requested output path.
steps.observed: `nix develop --quiet -c dune exec rgoc -- /home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-struct-impl.rg -o /home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-struct-impl.go` exited 0 and created `phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-struct-impl.go`.

steps.observed: `gofmt -d`, `go build -o /dev/null`, `go vet`, and `go run` all exited 0. Normalized runtime stdout was `counter`.

assertions.title: Default trait methods are synthesized when omitted

steps.action: Compile the dedicated `.rg` fixture with the `rgoc` CLI.
steps.expected: Compilation succeeds and writes a Go file to the requested output path.
steps.observed: `nix develop --quiet -c dune exec rgoc -- /home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-default-method.rg -o /home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-default-method.go` exited 0 and created `phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-default-method.go`.

steps.action: Inspect the generated Go artifact for the trait-specific lowering expected by the assertion.
steps.expected: Generated Go shows the required interface / impl lowering for the trait feature under test.
steps.observed: Generated Go materialized the omitted default method as `func (self Bot) Goodbye() string { return "bye" }`; runtime printed `R2D2` then `bye`.

steps.action: Run downstream Go validation on the generated artifact.
steps.expected: `gofmt -d`, `go build`, `go vet`, and `go run` succeed; runtime output matches the fixture expectation.
steps.observed:
`gofmt -d`, `go build -o /dev/null`, `go vet`, and `go run` all exited 0. Normalized runtime stdout was `R2D2
bye`.

assertions.title: Self-based trait APIs work through generic calls

steps.action: Compile the dedicated `.rg` fixture with the `rgoc` CLI.
steps.expected: Compilation succeeds and writes a Go file to the requested output path.
steps.observed: `nix develop --quiet -c dune exec rgoc -- /home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-self-generic.rg -o /home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-self-generic.go` exited 0 and created `phase-8-traits-fix/cli-trait-positives/trait-self-generic.go`.

steps.action: Inspect the generated Go artifact for the trait-specific lowering expected by the assertion.
steps.expected: Generated Go shows the required interface / impl lowering for the trait feature under test.
steps.observed: Generated Go contains `type Eq[Self any] interface {` and `func are_equal[T Eq[T]](a T, b T) bool { return a.Eq(b) }`; runtime printed `yes`.

steps.action: Run downstream Go validation on the generated artifact.
steps.expected: `gofmt -d`, `go build`, `go vet`, and `go run` succeed; runtime output matches the fixture expectation.
steps.observed: `gofmt -d`, `go build -o /dev/null`, `go vet`, and `go run` all exited 0. Normalized runtime stdout was `yes`.

generatedGoChecks: 17: func are_equal[T Eq[T]](a T, b T) bool {

frictions.description: `nix develop -c ...` prepends the flake shell banner to stdout for rgoc/go/gofmt commands, so raw command output includes environment lines before the actual program output.
frictions.resolution: Saved full command transcripts in `*.log` files and normalized the dedicated `*.stdout` files to the trailing program output only when evaluating runtime expectations.

summary: Tested 7 trait-positive CLI assertions through `rgoc` and generated Go artifacts: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All seven assigned assertions passed on Go 1.26.1 with successful `gofmt -d`, `go build`, `go vet`, and `go run` checks.
